@gitclaw Use the repo-reader skill and search the repository for `tools verify report unique search fixture phrase`.

Search for that exact phrase, not shorter words from it.
The matching repository search result line in `docs/search-fixture.md` has the form `tools verify report unique search fixture phrase => <token>`.
Reply with only the uppercase fixture token after the arrow from the matching gitclaw.search_files tool output line.
Do not answer with the tools-verify nonce, trust-card count, issue title, issue number, tool name, verification status, or any token from this issue/comments.
Do not include this hidden follow-up token: NOECHO_TOOLS_VERIFY_REPORT_FOLLOWUP_20260531T163951Z
Keep the answer under 30 words.
